component.name: TerminalTiler Core
component.summary: Launch polished multi-terminal workspaces from reusable layouts

description.p: TerminalTiler Core is a native Ubuntu and Debian desktop application for launching split-terminal workspaces with per-tile startup commands, working directories, and reusable launch profiles.
It is designed for operator workflows that need multiple coordinated terminals in one polished window without rebuilding the layout every time.
TerminalTiler Core is the public, MIT-licensed foundation of TerminalTiler. Future Pro offerings may add paid workflow packs, convenience features, official support, or private extensions.

ul.li: Reusable launch presets with customizable split layouts
Per-tile startup commands and working-directory routing
Bundled GTK, libadwaita, and VTE runtime for distribution artifacts
